arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka Misses Arsenal vs Bournemouth Through Hamstring Injury

arts.ttl: Why is Bukayo Saka not playing for Arsenal today against Bournemouth? Injury update
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is not playing for Arsenal against Bournemouth due to the fact that he has not recovered from the injury that has kept him out of action since the international break. He also added that Ødegaard is not going to be fit for the tie against Bournemouth, saying “I think he’s not going to be fit for this game.

arts.ttl: 'Earn the right to play' - Mikel Arteta fires ruthless message to struggling Arsenal star - football.london
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has told Gabriel Jesus, he must "earn the right to play more" as he aims to get regular minutes following his injury setback last August. He's got our full support, he's a player that can play in various positions and he's a really important player for us." Jesus, who has only netted 19 times during his two-season spell with Arsenal, candidly spoke about his goal-scoring last year: "There are things that I don't control.

arts.ttl: William Saliba makes true Arsenal feelings clear as Mikel Arteta demand speaks volumes
arts.sum: Injuries and suspension have left Arsenal yet to truly hit their stride but still in an extremely strong position. Now cemented as a true titan of the world game despite his lack of silverware so far, Saliba continues to strive for more.
